groupings.title: E-Signatures & SDK
groupings.description: Add e-signatures, document signing, and TurboSign workflows, generate documents from templates, and manage partner organizations with the TurboDocx SDK across JavaScript, Python, Go, PHP, and Java.

groupings.title: HTML to Word
groupings.description: Convert HTML to Microsoft Word (.docx) documents in Node.js and the browser with @turbodocx/html-to-docx — no Puppeteer, Chrome, or LibreOffice required.
